protein_name: Low affinity ligand for the ERBB4 tyrosine kinase receptor. Concomitantly recruits ERBB1 and ERBB2 coreceptors, resulting in ligand-stimulated tyrosine phosphorylation and activation of the ERBB receptors. Does not bind to the ERBB1, ERBB2 and ERBB3 receptors. Belongs to the neuregulin family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: extracellular region; extracellular space; plasma membrane
raw_fields.Molecular Function: growth factor activity; protein binding; receptor ligand activity
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: heregulin 4; HRG4; neuregulin 4; Neuregulin-4; NRG-4; NRG4; Pro-neuregulin-4, membrane-bound isoform; Pro-NRG4
